expectations.text: Correctly identifies Mode B (no tech spec)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'Mode B detected' — no tech-spec path, no beads ticket
Invokes meld:meld-complexity-assessment, evaluates all 5 signals systematically
Identifies Multi-component (YES) and Multi-layer (YES), counts 2/5 signals, routes to Moderate

expectations.text: Recommends escalation ([P] Plan first or [W] Full MELD)
expectations.evidence: Recommends [P] Plan first as the default, explains reasoning about moving parts benefiting from a spec

expectations.text: Does not jump straight to coding without a plan
expectations.evidence: Even after user chooses [E], full Phase 2 context gathering runs with a 7-task plan, 9 ACs, and a human confirmation gate before execution
